title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S.-Iran Framework Brings Relief, but Challenges Loom
summary_full: The United States and Iran reached a preliminary deal that was expected to open the Strait of Hormuz. But it defers the toughest issues to further talks.
summary_public: The United States and Iran reached a preliminary deal that was expected to open the Strait of Hormuz. But it defers the toughest issues to further talks.

IR.label: neutral
